regexCodeList.string: ^You have \d+ total stats out of \d+ maximum\.$

Script.name: AutoTrainerScript
Script.script:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- AutoTrainer v6.6 (Mudlet Port) -- Changes from v6.6: -- 1. Persistence migrated to file-based state stored in the Mudlet home dir. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
if not string.trim then function string.trim(s) return (s:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")) end end
-- ======================================================================================= -- OUTPUT HELPERS (every output goes through safe_cecho) -- =======================================================================================
local function safe_cecho(text) -- Try cecho first (colored output) if type(cecho) == "function" then local ok, err = pcall(cecho, text) if ok then return end end -- Fallback: strip color tags and use echo if type(echo) == "function" then local plain = text:gsub("<[^>]->", "") pcall(echo, plain) end end
local function msg(s) safe_cecho(string.format("<gold>[AutoTrainer] %s\n", s)) end local function warn(s) safe_cecho(string.format("<tomato>[AutoTrainer] %s\n", s)) end local function okm(s) safe_cecho(string.format("<LimeGreen>[AutoTrainer] %s\n", s)) end local function sim_msg(s) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan>[AT:Check] %s\n", s)) end local function note(s) safe_cecho(s .. "\n") end
local function dbg(s) if state and state.debug_on then safe_cecho(string.format("<DodgerBlue>[AT:debug] %s\n", s)) end end
-- Stats / weights local STATS = { "Strength", "Intelligence", "Wisdom", "Dexterity", "Constitution", "Luck" }
local CLASS_WEIGHTS = { warrior = { Strength = 100, Dexterity = 60, Constitution = 60, Luck = 30, Wisdom = 5, Intelligence = 5 }, thief = { Dexterity = 100, Strength = 60, Luck = 60, Constitution = 35, Wisdom = 5, Intelligence = 5 }, mage = { Intelligence = 100, Wisdom = 100, Luck = 90, Constitution = 75, Dexterity = 25, Strength = 25 }, cleric = { Wisdom = 100, Intelligence = 60, Luck = 50, Strength = 25, Dexterity = 25, Constitution = 25 }, psi = { Intelligence = 90, Wisdom = 90, Luck = 50, Strength = 25, Dexterity = 25, Constitution = 25 }, ranger = { Constitution = 100, Strength = 60, Dexterity = 60, Wisdom = 50, Luck = 30, Intelligence = 20 }, paladin = { Constitution = 90, Intelligence = 90, Wisdom = 60, Strength = 30, Dexterity = 30, Luck = 25 }, } local CLASSES = { "warrior", "thief", "mage", "cleric", "psi", "ranger", "paladin" }
-- Cost brackets local COST_BRACKETS = { { min = 0, max = 70, cost = 1 }, { min = 71, max = 90, cost = 2 }, { min = 91, max = 130, cost = 3 }, { min = 131, max = 170, cost = 4 }, { min = 171, max = 200, cost = 6 }, { min = 201, max = 224, cost = 9 }, { min = 225, max = 250, cost = 11 }, { min = 251, max = 275, cost = 15 }, { min = 276, max = 290, cost = 17 }, { min = 291, max = 300, cost = 20 }, { min = 301, max = 325, cost = 25 }, { min = 326, max = 350, cost = 35 }, { min = 351, max = 375, cost = 50 }, { min = 376, max = 400, cost = 60 }, }
-- ======================================================================================= -- JSON SHIM -- ======================================================================================= local JSON local json_module_name = ""
do local ok, mod = pcall(require, "yajl") if ok and mod then JSON = { encode = mod.to_string, decode = mod.to_value } json_module_name = "yajl" else ok, mod = pcall(require, "dkjson") if ok and mod then JSON = mod json_module_name = "dkjson" end end if not JSON then JSON = { encode = function(_) return "{}" end, decode = function(_) return {} end } json_module_name = "none (using dummy)" end end
-- ======================================================================================= -- FILE-BASED PERSISTENCE -- =======================================================================================
local function persistence_dir() local home = (type(getMudletHomeDir) == "function" and getMudletHomeDir() or ".") local dir = home .. "/persistence" if type(mkdir) == "function" then pcall(mkdir, dir) end if type(lfs) == "table" and type(lfs.mkdir) == "function" then pcall(lfs.mkdir, dir) end return dir end
local SETTINGS_FILE = persistence_dir() .. "/g_autotrain_state.lua"
local function lua_serialize(value) local t = type(value) if t == "number" or t == "boolean" then return tostring(value) end if t == "string" then return string.format("%q", value) end if t == "table" then local out = {"{"} for k, v in pairs(value) do local key = (type(k) == "string" and k:match("^[%a_][%w_]*$")) and k or ("[" .. lua_serialize(k) .. "]") out[#out + 1] = key .. " = " .. lua_serialize(v) .. "," end out[#out + 1] = "}" return table.concat(out, " ") end return "nil" end
local DEBUG_STATE_FILE = "autotrain_debug_state.txt"
local function get_debug_state_paths() local paths, seen = {}, {}
local function add_path(path) if type(path) ~= "string" or path == "" then return end if seen[path] then return end seen[path] = true table.insert(paths, path) end
if type(getMudletHomeDir) == "function" then local home = getMudletHomeDir() if type(home) == "string" and home ~= "" then add_path(persistence_dir() .. "/" .. DEBUG_STATE_FILE) if type(getProfileName) == "function" then local profile = getProfileName() if type(profile) == "string" and profile ~= "" then add_path(home .. "/profiles/" .. profile .. "/" .. DEBUG_STATE_FILE) end end end end
-- Final fallback for unusual environments. add_path(DEBUG_STATE_FILE) return paths end
local function save_debug_state_file(value) local last_err = nil for _, path in ipairs(get_debug_state_paths()) do local ok, err = pcall(function() local f = assert(io.open(path, "w")) f:write(value and "true" or "false") f:close() end) if ok then dbg("Debug state file saved: " .. path) return true end last_err = err end warn("Warning: failed writing debug state file: " .. tostring(last_err)) return false end
local function load_debug_state_file() for _, path in ipairs(get_debug_state_paths()) do local ok, value = pcall(function() local f = io.open(path, "r") if not f then return nil end local content = f:read("*a") f:close() return content end) if ok and type(value) == "string" then value = value:gsub("%s+", ""):lower() if value == "true" then dbg("Debug state file loaded: " .. path .. " (true)") return true end if value == "false" then dbg("Debug state file loaded: " .. path .. " (false)") return false end end end return nil end
local function persist_load() local function resolve_table_save_refs(node, root, seen) if type(node) ~= "table" then return node end
-- table.save reference style: { <number> } points to root[index] if rawget(node, 1) ~= nil and rawget(node, 2) == nil and next(node, 1) == nil and type(node[1]) == "number" and type(root[node[1]]) == "table" then return resolve_table_save_refs(root[node[1]], root, seen) end
seen = seen or {} if seen[node] then return seen[node] end
local out = {} seen[node] = out for k, v in pairs(node) do out[resolve_table_save_refs(k, root, seen)] = resolve_table_save_refs(v, root, seen) end return out end
local ok, loaded = pcall(dofile, SETTINGS_FILE) if ok and type(loaded) == "table" then -- Defensive support for legacy table.save/table.load style payloads, -- where the first array slot is the persisted root table. if type(loaded[1]) == "table" and type(loaded.primary) ~= "string" and type(loaded.primary_manual) ~= "boolean" and type(loaded.debug_on) ~= "boolean" and type(loaded.custom_weights) ~= "table" then loaded = resolve_table_save_refs(loaded[1], loaded, {}) end
if type(loaded.primary) == "string" or type(loaded.primary_manual) == "boolean" or type(loaded.debug_on) == "boolean" or type(loaded.custom_weights) == "table" then return loaded end end
-- Fallback for older environments that still have table.load available. if type(table) == "table" and type(table.load) == "function" then local f = io.open(SETTINGS_FILE, "r") if f then f:close() local ok2, loaded2 = pcall(table.load, SETTINGS_FILE) if ok2 and type(loaded2) == "table" then return loaded2 end end end
return {} end
local function persist_save(payload) local f = io.open(SETTINGS_FILE, "w") if f then f:write("return " .. lua_serialize(payload)) f:close() end end
local function send_no_echo(cmd) if type(send) == "function" then pcall(function() send(cmd, false) end) end end
local function set_trigger(name, enabled) local fn = enabled and enableTrigger or disableTrigger pcall(fn, name) end
-- ======================================================================================= -- GLOBAL STATE -- =======================================================================================
state = { primary = "warrior", primary_manual = false, -- true when user explicitly set via "autotrain primary" debug_on = true, convert_pracs = false, -- when true, send "train convertall" before autotrain run/check loop_trains = 0, exec_mode = "run", custom_weights = {}, _timer_id = 0, _fb_tries = 0, }
-- ======================================================================================= -- CLASS HELPERS -- =======================================================================================
local function normalize_class(s) s = (s or ""):lower() s = s:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") local map = { warrior = "warrior", mage = "mage", cleric = "cleric", thief = "thief", psion = "psi", psionicist = "psi", psionic = "psi", psychic = "psi", mindmage = "psi", psi = "psi", ranger = "ranger", paladin = "paladin", } return map[s] end
local function gmcp_class_via_handler() if type(gmcp) ~= "table" then return nil end if type(gmcp.char) ~= "table" then return nil end if type(gmcp.char.base) ~= "table" then return nil end local class = gmcp.char.base.class or gmcp.char.base.Class or gmcp.char.base.CLASS if type(class) == "string" and class ~= "" then return normalize_class(class) end return nil end
local function debug_gmcp_snapshot(context) if not (state and state.debug_on) then return end local has_gmcp = (type(gmcp) == "table") local has_char = has_gmcp and (type(gmcp.char) == "table") local has_base = has_char and (type(gmcp.char.base) == "table") local class = has_base and (gmcp.char.base.class or "nil") or "nil" dbg(string.format("GMCP snapshot (%s): gmcp=%s char=%s base=%s class=%s", context or "unknown", tostring(has_gmcp), tostring(has_char), tostring(has_base), tostring(class))) end
-- ======================================================================================= -- SAVE / LOAD LOGIC -- =======================================================================================
function save_all_settings() save_debug_state_file(state.debug_on)
persist_save({ primary = state.primary, primary_manual = state.primary_manual, debug_on = state.debug_on, convert_pracs = (state.convert_pracs == true), custom_weights = state.custom_weights or {}, })
dbg(string.format("Settings saved: primary=%s manual=%s debug=%s", state.primary, tostring(state.primary_manual), tostring(state.debug_on))) end
function load_all_settings() local loaded = persist_load()
state.primary = (type(loaded.primary) == "string" and loaded.primary ~= "") and loaded.primary or "warrior" state.primary_manual = (loaded.primary_manual == true) state.debug_on = (loaded.debug_on == nil) and true or (loaded.debug_on == true) state.convert_pracs = (loaded.convert_pracs == true) state.custom_weights = type(loaded.custom_weights) == "table" and loaded.custom_weights or {}
local file_debug = load_debug_state_file() if type(file_debug) == "boolean" then state.debug_on = file_debug end
-- Only apply GMCP class if user has NOT manually overridden if not state.primary_manual then local gc = gmcp_class_via_handler() if gc then state.primary = gc end end
dbg(string.format("Settings loaded: primary=%s manual=%s debug=%s", state.primary, tostring(state.primary_manual), tostring(state.debug_on))) end
-- ======================================================================================= -- GMCP EVENT HANDLER -- =======================================================================================
function AutoTrain_OnGMCP() debug_gmcp_snapshot("gmcp event") local gc = gmcp_class_via_handler() if not gc then local raw = (type(gmcp) == "table" and type(gmcp.char) == "table" and type(gmcp.char.base) == "table") and gmcp.char.base.class or nil if type(raw) == "string" and raw ~= "" then warn("GMCP class not recognized: " .. raw .. ". Set with 'autotrain primary <class>'.") else dbg("GMCP class not available yet.") end return end
-- If user manually set a primary, GMCP does NOT override if state.primary_manual then dbg("GMCP class confirmed: " .. gc .. " (manual override active: " .. state.primary .. ")") return end
if gc ~= state.primary then state.primary = gc save_all_settings() okm("Primary class updated from GMCP: " .. gc) else dbg("GMCP class confirmed: " .. gc) end end
-- ======================================================================================= -- STAT / WEIGHT HELPERS -- =======================================================================================
local function get_weights_for_class(class_name) if state.custom_weights and state.custom_weights[class_name] then return state.custom_weights[class_name] end return CLASS_WEIGHTS[class_name] or CLASS_WEIGHTS["warrior"] end
local function is_customized(class_name) return (state.custom_weights and state.custom_weights[class_name] ~= nil) end
local function weights() return get_weights_for_class(state.primary) end
local function get_primaries_for_class(class_name) if class_name == "warrior" then return { "Strength" } elseif class_name == "thief" then return { "Dexterity" } elseif class_name == "mage" then return { "Intelligence", "Wisdom" } elseif class_name == "cleric" then return { "Wisdom" } elseif class_name == "psi" then return { "Intelligence", "Wisdom" } elseif class_name == "ranger" then return { "Constitution" } elseif class_name == "paladin" then return { "Constitution", "Intelligence" } end return { "Strength" } end
local function is_primary_for_class(stat, class_name) for _, s in ipairs(get_primaries_for_class(class_name)) do if s == stat then return true end end return false end
local function bracket_for(val) for _, b in ipairs(COST_BRACKETS) do if val >= b.min and val <= b.max then return b end end return COST_BRACKETS[#COST_BRACKETS] end
local function eff_cost(_, val, adj) local b = bracket_for(val) local v = b.cost + (adj or 0) if v < 1 then v = 1 end return v, b.max end
-- ======================================================================================= -- TRAIN SNAPSHOT -- =======================================================================================
local function empty_stats() local t = {} for _, s in ipairs(STATS) do t[s] = { current = 0, max = 0, adj = 0, your = 0 } end return t end
snapshot = empty_stats() local pending = false local snapshot_rows = 0 local saw_end = false
function StartTrainSnapshot(mode) state.loop_trains = 0 state.exec_mode = mode or "run"
pending = true snapshot = empty_stats() snapshot_rows = 0 saw_end = false
set_trigger("TR_TRAIN_FULL", true) set_trigger("TR_TRAIN_MIN", true) set_trigger("TR_TRAIN_TRN1", true) set_trigger("TR_TRAIN_TRN2", true) set_trigger("TR_TRAIN_END", true) set_trigger("TR_TRAIN_END2", true) set_trigger("TR_TRAIN_END3", true)
dbg("sending: train (Mode: " .. state.exec_mode .. ")") send_no_echo("train")
state._timer_id = state._timer_id + 1 state._fb_tries = 0 local id = state._timer_id tempTimer(0.50, function() SafeEndTrainSnapshot(id) end) end
function SafeEndTrainSnapshot(id) if not pending or id ~= state._timer_id then return end if saw_end and snapshot_rows > 0 then EndTrainSnapshot() return end state._fb_tries = state._fb_tries + 1 if state._fb_tries >= 8 then EndTrainSnapshot() return end tempTimer(0.25, function() SafeEndTrainSnapshot(id) end) end
function CaptureTrainFull(matches) if not pending then return end local stat = matches[2] local race = tonumber(matches[4] or "0") or 0 local tier = tonumber(matches[5] or "0") or 0 local wish = tonumber(matches[6] or "0") or 0 local trained = tonumber(matches[8] or "0") or 0 local maxv = tonumber(matches[9] or "0") or 0 snapshot[stat] = { current = trained, adj = race + tier + wish, max = maxv } snapshot_rows = snapshot_rows + 1 end
function CaptureTrainMinimal(matches) if not pending then return end local stat = matches[2] local current = tonumber(matches[3] or "0") or 0 local maxv = tonumber(matches[6] or "0") or 0 snapshot[stat] = { current = current, adj = 0, max = maxv } snapshot_rows = snapshot_rows + 1 end
function CaptureTrainCount(matches) local n = tonumber(matches and matches[2] or "0") or 0 if n < 0 then n = 0 end state.loop_trains = n dbg("Captured trains available: " .. n) end
function MarkEnd() saw_end = true end
local function EndTrainSnapshot_internal() pending = false set_trigger("TR_TRAIN_FULL", false) set_trigger("TR_TRAIN_MIN", false) set_trigger("TR_TRAIN_TRN1", false) set_trigger("TR_TRAIN_TRN2", false) set_trigger("TR_TRAIN_END", false) set_trigger("TR_TRAIN_END2", false) set_trigger("TR_TRAIN_END3", false) end
function EndTrainSnapshot() if not pending then return end EndTrainSnapshot_internal() PlanAndExecuteBatch() end
-- ======================================================================================= -- PLANNER -- =======================================================================================
local function choose_best(sim, caps, adjmap, w) local best_stat, best_score = nil, -1 for _, stat in ipairs(STATS) do local cur, cap = sim[stat], caps[stat] if cur < cap then local c = eff_cost(stat, cur, adjmap[stat]) local score = (w[stat] or 10) / math.max(c, 1) if score > best_score then best_score, best_stat = score, stat end end end return best_stat end
function PlanAndExecuteBatch() local is_check = (state.exec_mode == "check") local sessions = tonumber(state.loop_trains or 0) or 0
if is_check then safe_cecho("<cyan>------------------------------------------------------\n") sim_msg("ANALYSIS START") sim_msg("Trains Available: " .. sessions) sim_msg("Strategy: " .. state.primary) end
if sessions <= 0 then if is_check then sim_msg("Result: No trains to spend.") else msg("You have no training sessions available.") end return end
local w = weights() local sim, caps, adj = {}, {}, {}
for _, s in ipairs(STATS) do local row = snapshot[s] or {} sim[s] = row.current or 0 adj[s] = row.adj or 0 local mx = row.max or 0 if mx <= 0 then mx = 400 end caps[s] = mx end
local primary_stats = get_primaries_for_class(state.primary) local benchmark_cost = 999 for _, ps in ipairs(primary_stats) do local p_cost = eff_cost(ps, sim[ps], adj[ps]) if p_cost < benchmark_cost then benchmark_cost = p_cost end end
if is_check then sim_msg("Benchmark Cost (Primary): " .. benchmark_cost) end
local plan = {} local temp_caps = table.deepcopy(caps) local safety = 20000 local total_spent = 0
while sessions > 0 and safety > 0 do safety = safety - 1 local stat = choose_best(sim, temp_caps, adj, w) if not stat then break end
local cur = sim[stat] local cost_now, bracket_end = eff_cost(stat, cur, adj[stat])
if not is_primary_for_class(stat, state.primary) and cost_now > benchmark_cost then temp_caps[stat] = cur else if sessions < cost_now then if is_check then sim_msg(string.format("Stopping: Best stat '%s' costs %d, but only %d sessions left.", stat, cost_now, sessions)) end break end
local affordable_qty = math.floor(sessions / cost_now) local can_train_to_cap = caps[stat] - cur local can_train_in_bracket = bracket_end - cur + 1 local qty = math.min(affordable_qty, can_train_to_cap, can_train_in_bracket)
if qty <= 0 then temp_caps[stat] = cur else local last = plan[#plan] if last and last.stat == stat then last.qty = last.qty + qty last.cost = last.cost + (qty * cost_now) last.min_unit_cost = math.min(last.min_unit_cost or cost_now, cost_now) last.max_unit_cost = math.max(last.max_unit_cost or cost_now, cost_now) else plan[#plan + 1] = { stat = stat, qty = qty, cost = (qty * cost_now), unit_cost = cost_now, min_unit_cost = cost_now, max_unit_cost = cost_now } end
sim[stat] = cur + qty sessions = sessions - (qty * cost_now) total_spent = total_spent + (qty * cost_now) end end end
if #plan == 0 then if is_check then sim_msg("Result: No stats trained (Caps reached or too expensive).") else if state.loop_trains > 0 then safe_cecho("\n") msg("All eligible stats are at their caps or too expensive. Saving " .. state.loop_trains .. " trains.") else msg("Nothing to train.") end end return end
if is_check then sim_msg("Proposed Plan:") for _, c in ipairs(plan) do local cost_label = (c.min_unit_cost ~= c.max_unit_cost) and string.format("%d-%d/train", c.min_unit_cost, c.max_unit_cost) or string.format("%d/train", c.unit_cost) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan> Train %-2d %-13s (Cost: %-3d @ %s)\n", c.qty, c.stat, c.cost, cost_label)) end safe_cecho("<cyan>------------------------------------------------------\n") sim_msg("Total Cost: " .. total_spent) sim_msg("Remaining : " .. sessions) else dbg("executing " .. #plan .. " batched commands...") for _, c in ipairs(plan) do send_no_echo(string.format("train %d %s", c.qty, c.stat)) end safe_cecho("\n") okm("Batch sent: " .. #plan .. " command(s).") end end
-- ======================================================================================= -- WEIGHTS MANAGEMENT -- =======================================================================================
function DisplayWeights(class_name) local class = normalize_class(class_name) if not class then warn("Unknown class: " .. class_name) return end
local w = get_weights_for_class(class) local custom_str = is_customized(class) and "Customized" or "Default"
note(string.format("-- Weights for %s (%s) --", class, custom_str)) note(string.format(" %-13s %-8s %s", "Stat", "Weight", "Primary")) note(string.rep("-", 33)) for _, stat in ipairs(STATS) do local primary_marker = is_primary_for_class(stat, class) and "*" or "" note(string.format(" %-13s %-8d %s", stat, w[stat], primary_marker)) end end
function HandleWeights(args) local sub, rest = string.match(args, "^(%S+)%s*(.*)$") sub = (sub or ""):lower()
if sub == "show" then local target = string.trim(rest) if target == "" then DisplayWeights(state.primary) elseif target == "all" then for _, class in ipairs(CLASSES) do DisplayWeights(class) note("") end else DisplayWeights(target) end
elseif sub == "set" then local class_str, stat_str, val_str = string.match(rest, "^(%S+)%s+(%S+)%s+(%S+)$") local class = normalize_class(class_str)
local stat_map = { str = "Strength", int = "Intelligence", wis = "Wisdom", dex = "Dexterity", con = "Constitution", lck = "Luck", luck = "Luck" } local stat = stat_map[(stat_str or ""):lower()] or (CLASS_WEIGHTS.warrior[stat_str] and stat_str)
local val = tonumber(val_str) if not (class and stat and val) then warn("Usage: autotrain weights set <class> <stat> <value>") return end
if not state.custom_weights[class] then state.custom_weights[class] = table.deepcopy(CLASS_WEIGHTS[class]) end state.custom_weights[class][stat] = val save_all_settings() okm(string.format("Weight for %s -> %s set to %d.", class, stat, val))
elseif sub == "reset" then local target = string.trim(rest) if target == "all" then state.custom_weights = {} save_all_settings() okm("All class weights have been reset to default.") else local class = normalize_class(target) if not class then warn("Unknown class: " .. target) return end if state.custom_weights[class] then state.custom_weights[class] = nil save_all_settings() okm(class .. " weights have been reset to default.") else msg(class .. " is already using default weights.") end end else warn("Unknown 'weights' subcommand. Use: show, set, reset.") end end
-- ======================================================================================= -- HELP -- =======================================================================================
function ShowHelp() local ok, err = pcall(function() local prims = table.concat(get_primaries_for_class(state.primary), ", ")
safe_cecho(string.format("\n<gold>-- %s --\n", "AutoTrainer Commands")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan>%-30s<ansiWhite>%s\n", "autotrain", "Spends available trains based on weights.")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan>%-30s<ansiWhite>%s\n", "autotrain check", "Dry run. Shows what WOULD be trained.")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan>%-30s<ansiWhite>%s\n", "autotrain convertpracs on|off", "Toggle sending 'train convertall' before run/check.")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan>%-30s<ansiWhite>%s\n", "autotrain weights show", "Shows the weights for your current class.")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan>%-30s<ansiWhite>%s\n", "autotrain weights set <c> <st> <v>", "Sets a stat weight for a class.")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan>%-30s<ansiWhite>%s\n", "autotrain weights reset <c>", "Resets a class's weights to default.")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan>%-30s<ansiWhite>%s\n", "autotrain primary <class>", "Sets your primary class (overrides GMCP).")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan>%-30s<ansiWhite>%s\n", "autotrain debug on|off", "Toggles blue debug logs.")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan>%-30s<ansiWhite>%s\n", "autotrain help", "Shows this help message."))
safe_cecho(string.format("\n<gold>-- %s --\n", "Status")) local manual_tag = state.primary_manual and " [manual]" or " [gmcp]" safe_cecho(string.format("<gold>%-15s<ansiWhite>%s\n", "Primary Class :", state.primary .. " (Primaries: " .. prims .. ")" .. manual_tag)) safe_cecho(string.format("<gold>%-15s<ansiWhite>%s\n", "Debug Mode :", state.debug_on and "ON" or "OFF")) safe_cecho(string.format("<gold>%-15s<ansiWhite>%s\n", "Convert Pracs :", state.convert_pracs and "ON" or "OFF")) end) if not ok then warn("Error displaying help: " .. tostring(err)) end end
-- ======================================================================================= -- COMMAND ROUTER -- =======================================================================================
function Cmd_AutoTrain(matches) local params = string.trim((matches and matches[2]) or "")
if params == "" then if state.convert_pracs then send_no_echo("train convertall") end StartTrainSnapshot("run") return end
local a, b = string.match(params, "^(%S+)%s*(.*)$") a = string.trim((a or ""):lower()) b = string.trim((b or ""):lower())
if a == "check" then if state.convert_pracs then send_no_echo("train convertall") end StartTrainSnapshot("check") return end
if a == "convertpracs" then if b == "on" or b == "off" then state.convert_pracs = (b == "on") save_all_settings() okm("Convert-practices mode is now " .. (state.convert_pracs and "ON" or "OFF") .. ".") else warn("Usage: autotrain convertpracs on|off") end return end
if a == "weights" then HandleWeights(b) return end
if a == "primary" then local class = normalize_class(b) if class then local previous = state.primary state.primary = class state.primary_manual = true -- mark as manually overridden save_all_settings() if previous == class then okm("Primary class confirmed: " .. class .. " (manual override).") else okm("Primary class set to " .. class .. " (manual override). GMCP will not change it.") end else if b == "auto" or b == "gmcp" or b == "reset" then state.primary_manual = false local gc = gmcp_class_via_handler() if gc then state.primary = gc end save_all_settings() okm("Primary class reset to GMCP auto-detect: " .. state.primary) else warn("Unknown class. Valid: warrior, thief, mage, cleric, psi, ranger, paladin") warn("Use 'autotrain primary auto' to restore GMCP auto-detect.") end end return end
if a == "debug" then if b == "on" or b == "off" then state.debug_on = (b == "on") save_all_settings() okm("Debug mode is now " .. (state.debug_on and "ON" or "OFF") .. ".") else warn("Usage: autotrain debug on|off") end return end
if a == "help" then -- pcall so errors in GMCP handler don't prevent help from showing pcall(AutoTrain_OnGMCP) ShowHelp() return end
warn("Unknown subcommand '" .. a .. "'. Try 'autotrain help'.") end
-- ======================================================================================= -- INITIALIZATION -- =======================================================================================
function AutoTrainer_Initialize() -- Ensure table.deepcopy exists if not table.deepcopy then function table.deepcopy(t) if type(t) ~= "table" then return t end local mt = getmetatable(t) local res = {} for k, v in pairs(t) do res[k] = table.deepcopy(v) end setmetatable(res, mt) return res end end
-- Load saved settings (respects primary_manual flag) load_all_settings()
-- Seed defaults on first ever run (if no saved file exists yet) local existing_state = persist_load() if next(existing_state) == nil then save_all_settings() -- persist current defaults end
-- Deferred init message so Mudlet UI is ready if type(tempTimer) == "function" then tempTimer(0.1, function() msg("Loaded (v6.6). JSON: " .. json_module_name) debug_gmcp_snapshot("init")
-- Auto-detect from GMCP only if not manually overridden if not state.primary_manual then local gc = gmcp_class_via_handler() if gc then if gc ~= state.primary then state.primary = gc save_all_settings() okm("Detected class from GMCP: " .. gc) else dbg("GMCP class matches saved primary: " .. gc) end else warn("GMCP class not detected. Use 'autotrain primary <class>' or check GMCP.") end else dbg("Manual primary override active: " .. state.primary .. " (GMCP skipped)") end end) else -- Fallback if tempTimer not available msg("Loaded (v6.6). JSON: " .. json_module_name) end
-- Register GMCP event handler if type(registerAnonymousEventHandler) == "function" then registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.base", "AutoTrain_OnGMCP") dbg("Registered GMCP handler for gmcp.char.base.") end end
AutoTrainer_Initialize()
